actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Progress has many steps to perform properly.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Progress runs more smoothly with music playing.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: He was pumping his fist as he stepped firmly toward her.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: He was pumping his fist as he stepped firmly toward her.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Making positive changes towards the advancment of civilization is progress played to music.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: For progress to happen, one must take the lead.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes you have to spin around and around before progress can happen.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Progress is much more than a mosh pit.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: He's always a step or two behind.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: He's always a step or two behind.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: To keep up with progress, one cannot be a step or two behind.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Learn and practice the steps, and progress will follow.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: When progress is your goal, play lively music and move to the beat.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes, to get progress moving, one must get out there on the floor and start shaking their hips to the music.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: When trying to progress, watch out for those who will step on your toes.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If you want to progess, you have to move your feet.
